mailer_templates_recovery_content:
🔑

SOULMATE

Modern Indian Matchmaking

Reset your Soulmate password

We received a request to reset the password for {{ .Email }}. Use the secure button below to choose a new password and return to your conversations safely.

What happens next

1. Open the secure reset page.
2. Set your new password.
3. Sign back in and continue your journey.

Reset Password  →

Button not working? Paste this link into your browser:

{{ .ConfirmationURL }}

🔒  Security reminder

If you did not request this reset, you can ignore this email. Your current password remains active until a new one is saved.

❤  Soulmate · Modern Indian Matchmaking
